---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for the Webber Protocol
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? How does it serve agent-to-agent interaction?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Protocol Impact
- Which program(s) does this affect? (webber-registry, webber-token, marketplace)
- Does this require a governance vote?
- Does this change tokenomics?

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
